load-and-prepare-pdf-with-pdfpageeditor.title: Load and Prepare PDF with PdfPageEditor
load-and-prepare-pdf-with-pdfpageeditor.description: Shows how to load a PDF, set rotation and zoom, apply pending changes, and save the document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

in-memory-pdf-page-rotation.title: In-Memory PDF Page Rotation with PdfPageEditor
in-memory-pdf-page-rotation.description: Shows how to load a PDF from a MemoryStream into PdfPageEditor, rotate all pages, adjust zoom, and save the modified document without writing the source file to disk.

edit-pdf-page-properties-with-pdfpageedi.title: Edit PDF Page Properties and Save with PdfPageEditor
edit-pdf-page-properties-with-pdfpageedi.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to change page zoom and rotation, apply the changes, and save the edited PDF to a new file.

save-modified-pdf-to-memorystream.title: Save Modified PDF to MemoryStream with PdfPageEditor
save-modified-pdf-to-memorystream.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, applying a zoom change with PdfPageEditor, and saving the result directly into a MemoryStream for further in‑memory processing.

rotate-page-two-by-90-degrees.title: Rotate Specific PDF Page by 90 Degrees
rotate-page-two-by-90-degrees.description: Shows how to rotate the second page of a PDF document by 90 degrees using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

rotate-specific-pdf-pages-180-degrees.title: Rotate Specific PDF Pages by 180 Degrees
rotate-specific-pdf-pages-180-degrees.description: Shows how to rotate selected pages (3, 5, and 7) of a PDF by 180° using Aspose.Pdf.Facades PdfPageEditor.

rotate-page-four-180-degrees.title: Rotate Specific PDF Page Using PdfPageEditor
rotate-page-four-180-degrees.description: Shows how to rotate only the fourth page of a PDF by 180 degrees using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor with a memory stream.

retrieve-pdf-page-size.title: Retrieve PDF Page Size Using PdfPageEditor
retrieve-pdf-page-size.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with PdfPageEditor, get the dimensions of a specific page using GetPageSize, and log the width and height.

retrieve-pdf-page-rotation.title: Retrieve PDF Page Rotation with PdfPageEditor
retrieve-pdf-page-rotation.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF file using PdfPageEditor and obtain the rotation angle of a specific page (page 4) with GetPageRotation.

resize-specific-pdf-page-to-letter-size.title: Resize Specific PDF Page to Letter Size with PdfPageEditor
resize-specific-pdf-page-to-letter-size.description: Demonstrates how to change the size of a single PDF page (page 6) to Letter dimensions using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor.

set-zoom-on-specific-pdf-page.title: Set Zoom on Specific PDF Page
set-zoom-on-specific-pdf-page.description: Shows how to adjust the zoom level of page three to 150 % using Aspose.Pdf.Facades PdfPageEditor.

zoom-even-pages-pdf.title: Zoom Even Pages of PDF by 1.2x
zoom-even-pages-pdf.description: Shows how to apply a 1.2 zoom factor to all even‑numbered pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

apply-fade-transition-to-first-pdf-page.title: Apply Fade Transition to First PDF Page
apply-fade-transition-to-first-pdf-page.description: Shows how to set a Fade page transition with a 2‑second duration on the first page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor.

apply-dissolve-transition-to-pdf-page.title: Apply Dissolve Transition to PDF Page
apply-dissolve-transition-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to set a 3‑second dissolve page transition on page 5 of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

set-display-duration-pdf-page.title: Set Display Duration for a PDF Page
set-display-duration-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to set the display duration of a specific PDF page, enabling control over slide show timing.

align-page-two-left.title: Align Page Two Left Using PdfPageEditor
align-page-two-left.description: Shows how to left‑justify the content of the second page of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

align-page-3-vertically-top.title: Align Page 3 Vertically to Top Using PdfPageEditor
align-page-3-vertically-top.description: Demonstrates how to vertically align the content of the third page of a PDF to the top using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor facade.

resize-pdf-page-contents-10-percent-marg.title: Resize PDF Page Contents with 10% Margin
resize-pdf-page-contents-10-percent-marg.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor to resize the contents of all pages in a PDF by applying a 10% margin on each side.

resize-specific-pdf-pages-custom-margins.title: Resize Specific PDF Pages with Custom Margins
resize-specific-pdf-pages-custom-margins.description: Demonstrates how to resize the contents of selected PDF pages (pages 2 and 4) by applying custom left and right margins using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

batch-rotate-first-page-pdfs.title: Batch Rotate First Page of PDFs
batch-rotate-first-page-pdfs.description: Demonstrates iterating over a folder of PDF files, loading each with Aspose.Pdf, rotating the first page 90 degrees clockwise, and saving the modified document to an output directory.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-a4.title: Batch Convert PDFs to A4 Page Size
batch-convert-pdfs-to-a4.description: Shows how to iterate over multiple PDF files and use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to resize every page to A4 dimensions and save the converted documents.

rotate-and-resize-page3-to-letter.title: Rotate and Resize Page 3 to Letter Size
rotate-and-resize-page3-to-letter.description: Shows how to rotate page 3 by 90° and change its dimensions to Letter size in a single operation using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor.

zoom-selected-non-consecutive-pdf-pages.title: Zoom Selected Non-Consecutive PDF Pages
zoom-selected-non-consecutive-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to select specific non‑consecutive pages in a PDF using the PdfPageEditor.ProcessPages array and apply a common zoom factor to those pages.

set-transition-duration-for-specific-pdf.title: Set Transition Duration for Specific PDF Pages
set-transition-duration-for-specific-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to select a range of pages using the PdfPageEditor facade and set each page's transition duration to one second.

rotate-pdf-pages-add-rotated-stamp.title: Rotate PDF Pages and Add a Rotated Stamp
rotate-pdf-pages-add-rotated-stamp.description: Demonstrates validating rotation angles, rotating all pages of a PDF with PdfPageEditor, and adding a rotated text stamp using PdfFileStamp.

handle-invalid-rotation-value.title: Handle Invalid Rotation Value When Rotating PDF Pages
handle-invalid-rotation-value.description: Demonstrates assigning a page rotation with PdfPageEditor, catching InvalidValueFormatException for out‑of‑range values, and falling back to a default rotation to avoid runtime errors.

create-contentsresizeparameters-uniform-.title: Create ContentsResizeParameters with Uniform Margins
create-contentsresizeparameters-uniform-.description: Demonstrates how to instantiate a ContentsResizeParameters object with equal absolute margins of five points on all sides, ready to be used with PdfFileEditor methods such as ResizeContents or AddMargins.

create-uniform-15-percent-margins.title: Create Uniform 15% Margins for PDF Content Scaling
create-uniform-15-percent-margins.description: Demonstrates how to instantiate a ContentsResizeParameters object with 15% margins on all sides using the MarginsPercent factory method, ready to be used with PdfFileEditor resizing operations.

apply-different-zoom-levels-to-pdf-pages.title: Apply Different Zoom Levels to PDF Pages
apply-different-zoom-levels-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to iterate through each page of a PDF and set a distinct zoom factor using PdfPageEditor, then save the modified document.

set-fade-transition-for-all-pdf-pages.title: Set Fade Transition for All PDF Pages
set-fade-transition-for-all-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to apply a uniform fade (dissolve) transition to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor.

assign-page-transitions-by-content.title: Assign Page Transitions Based on Content Type
assign-page-transitions-by-content.description: Shows how to loop through PDF pages, detect image‑heavy versus text‑only pages, and apply different page transition effects using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

set-per-page-display-duration.title: Set Per‑Page Display Duration Based on Word Count
set-per-page-display-duration.description: Demonstrates how to calculate a reading time for each PDF page from its word count and assign that duration using the PdfPageEditor facade.

edit-pdf-in-memory-with-pdfpageeditor.title: Edit PDF In-Memory with PdfPageEditor
edit-pdf-in-memory-with-pdfpageeditor.description: Shows how to create a PDF entirely in memory, modify its pages using PdfPageEditor (rotate and zoom), and save the edited document to another memory stream.

modify-pdf-pages-rotate-zoom-resize.title: Modify PDF Pages: Rotate, Zoom, Resize, and Move Content
modify-pdf-pages-rotate-zoom-resize.description: Shows how to chain multiple page property changes—rotation, zoom factor, page size, and content position—using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor and save the updated PDF.

reset-rotation-page-six.title: Reset Rotation of PDF Page Six
reset-rotation-page-six.description: Shows how to reset the rotation of the sixth page in a PDF document to zero degrees using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

revert-pdf-page-size-to-original.title: Revert PDF Page Size to Original Dimensions
revert-pdf-page-size-to-original.description: Demonstrates how to store the original size of a specific PDF page, change its dimensions, and then revert it back using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades PdfPageEditor.

log-pdf-page-dimensions-rotations.title: Log PDF Page Dimensions and Rotations Before and After Editing
log-pdf-page-dimensions-rotations.description: Demonstrates how to capture and log each page's width, height, and rotation before applying edits, then log the updated values after rotating and zooming the pages using Aspose.Pdf.

safely-retrieve-pdf-page-size.title: Safely Retrieve PDF Page Size with Try‑Catch
safely-retrieve-pdf-page-size.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to get the size of PDF pages and handle requests for non‑existent pages using try‑catch blocks.

apply-left-horizontal-alignment-to-pdf-p.title: Apply Left Horizontal Alignment to All PDF Pages
apply-left-horizontal-alignment-to-pdf-p.description: Demonstrates how to use PdfPageEditor to set a uniform left horizontal alignment for every page in a PDF and save the result.

apply-vertical-alignment-to-selected-pdf.title: Apply Vertical Alignment to Selected PDF Pages
apply-vertical-alignment-to-selected-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to set the vertical alignment of specific pages in a PDF to the top using PdfPageEditor.

apply-boxout-transition-to-pdf-page.title: Apply BoxOut Transition to a PDF Page
apply-boxout-transition-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to set a BoxOut page transition with a three‑second duration on a specific page using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

set-page-transition-cover.title: Set Page Transition to Cover for Specific PDF Page
set-page-transition-cover.description: Demonstrates how to apply a Cover page transition with a one‑second duration to page 4 of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor.

set-zoom-of-page-to-75-percent.title: Set Zoom of Specific PDF Page to 75%
set-zoom-of-page-to-75-percent.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to set the zoom level of page 5 to 75% and save the modified PDF.

set-zoom-of-specific-pdf-page.title: Set Zoom of Specific PDF Page Using PdfPageEditor
set-zoom-of-specific-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to apply a 2.0 zoom factor (200 % magnification) to page 7 of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade and save the result.

shrink-pdf-page-contents.title: Shrink PDF Page Contents by 5% Margin
shrink-pdf-page-contents.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor to resize all page contents to 90% of their original size, adding a uniform 5% margin on each side of every page.

add-20-percent-margins-to-pdf-pages.title: Add 20% Margins to PDF Pages
add-20-percent-margins-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to add a 20% whitespace margin around each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor for printing purposes.

change-pdf-page-orientation-to-landscape.title: Change PDF Page Orientation to Landscape (A4)
change-pdf-page-orientation-to-landscape.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to convert a PDF page from portrait to landscape by setting an A4 landscape PageSize and saving the result.

convert-pdf-portrait-to-landscape.title: Convert PDF Page from Portrait to Landscape
convert-pdf-portrait-to-landscape.description: Shows how to change a PDF page's size to landscape by swapping width and height and rotating the page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

rotate-pdf-page-180-preserve-transitions.title: Rotate PDF Page 180° While Preserving Transitions
rotate-pdf-page-180-preserve-transitions.description: Shows how to rotate a specific PDF page by 180 degrees using PdfPageEditor without altering any existing page transition settings.

resize-pdf-contents-rotate-pages-90.title: Resize PDF Contents and Rotate Pages by 90 Degrees
resize-pdf-contents-rotate-pages-90.description: Demonstrates how to resize the contents of a PDF and then rotate all pages 90° using Aspose.Pdf facade classes.

incremental-update-pdf-with-annotation.title: Incremental PDF Update with Annotation
incremental-update-pdf-with-annotation.description: Opens a PDF in read/write mode, adds a text annotation, saves the document using Aspose.Pdf's incremental update feature, and copies the updated file while preserving the original structure.

backup-original-pdf-and-save-edited-copy.title: Backup Original PDF and Save Edited Copy
backup-original-pdf-and-save-edited-copy.description: The example creates a backup of an existing PDF, then uses Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor to modify the document and saves the edited version as a separate file, leaving the original untouched.

set-display-duration-pdf-slideshow.title: Set Display Duration for PDF Pages to Create a Slideshow
set-display-duration-pdf-slideshow.description: Shows how to assign a per‑page display duration in a PDF using PdfPageEditor, enabling custom slide timing for a slideshow presentation.

set-split-transition-on-pdf-page.title: Set Split Transition on PDF Page
set-split-transition-on-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to apply a split page transition with a 2‑second duration to a specific page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

disable-page-transition-animation.title: Disable Page Transition Animation in PDF
disable-page-transition-animation.description: Shows how to set the transition duration to zero for a specific page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor, thereby disabling the page transition animation.

apply-sequential-page-transitions.title: Apply Sequential Page Transitions to PDF
apply-sequential-page-transitions.description: Shows how to load a PDF, iterate through its pages, and assign different page transition effects using PdfPageEditor, then save the modified document.

set-pdf-page-zoom-to-100-percent.title: Set PDF Page Zoom to 100% Using PdfPageEditor
set-pdf-page-zoom-to-100-percent.description: Demonstrates how to set the zoom factor to 1.0 (100%) for all pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade and save the modified document.

zoom-odd-pages-in-pdf.title: Zoom Odd Pages in PDF
zoom-odd-pages-in-pdf.description: Shows how to apply a 1.2 zoom factor to odd‑numbered pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

set-zoom-for-even-pdf-pages.title: Set Zoom for Even PDF Pages
set-zoom-for-even-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to apply a 0.8 zoom factor to all even‑numbered pages of a PDF and save the modified document.

resize-specific-pdf-pages-to-letter.title: Resize Specific PDF Pages to Letter Size
resize-specific-pdf-pages-to-letter.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to change the page size of pages 3‑6 to US Letter dimensions.

set-last-page-a5-booklet.title: Set Last Page Size to A5 for a PDF Booklet
set-last-page-a5-booklet.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF, select the last page, change its size to A5, and save the result using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

rotate-every-third-page-270-degrees.title: Rotate Every Third PDF Page by 270°
rotate-every-third-page-270-degrees.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to rotate every third page of a PDF by 270 degrees, creating an alternating landscape orientation, and then save the result.

retrieve-page-size-after-rotation.title: Retrieve Page Size After Rotation
retrieve-page-size-after-rotation.description: Demonstrates rotating a specific PDF page with PdfPageEditor, then obtaining the page dimensions that reflect the new orientation, including handling width/height swapping for 90°/270° rotations.

retrieve-page-rotation-after-resizing.title: Retrieve Page Rotation After Resizing PDF Page
retrieve-page-rotation-after-resizing.description: Shows how to get a page's rotation, change the page size using PdfPageEditor, and verify that the rotation value remains unchanged after the resize.

apply-custom-page-transitions-to-pdf.title: Apply Custom Page Transitions to PDF Pages
apply-custom-page-transitions-to-pdf.description: Shows how to assign different transition effects to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

set-per-page-display-duration__v2.title: Set Per-Page Display Duration in PDF
set-per-page-display-duration__v2.description: Shows how to assign a different display duration to each PDF page using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor, increasing the duration by one second for each subsequent page.

center-page-content-horizontally.title: Center Page Content Horizontally Using PdfPageEditor
center-page-content-horizontally.description: Shows how to center the existing content of a specific PDF page horizontally by using the PdfPageEditor facade and the HorizontalAlignment property.

vertically-center-content-page-three.title: Vertically Center Content on Specific PDF Page
vertically-center-content-page-three.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to vertically align the existing content of page 3 to the middle of the page and save the modified PDF.

set-horizontal-alignment-and-zoom-for-pa.title: Set Horizontal Alignment and Zoom for a Specific PDF Page
set-horizontal-alignment-and-zoom-for-pa.description: Shows how to center‑align the content and increase the zoom level of page 4 in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

add-10-percent-margins-to-pdf-pages.title: Add 10% Margins to All PDF Pages
add-10-percent-margins-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor to add uniform 10% margins on every side of each page in a PDF, effectively resizing the content for printing.

set-fade-transition-pdf.title: Set Fade Transition for All PDF Pages
set-fade-transition-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to apply a fade (dissolve) transition with a 2‑second duration to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

rotate-pdf-pages-from-network-stream.title: Rotate PDF Pages from a Network Stream
rotate-pdf-pages-from-network-stream.description: Downloads a PDF via HTTP, rotates all pages using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor, and writes the modified PDF back to the same memory stream.

resize-pdf-pages-using-pdfpageeditor.title: Resize PDF Pages Using PdfPageEditor
resize-pdf-pages-using-pdfpageeditor.description: Shows how to load a PDF from a byte array, change all pages to a specified PageSize with PdfPageEditor, and save the modified document to a file.

dispose-pdfpageeditor-after-editing.title: Proper Disposal of PdfPageEditor After Editing PDF
dispose-pdfpageeditor-after-editing.description: Demonstrates how to edit a PDF (rotate pages, set zoom) using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor and ensures the editor and document are disposed correctly with using blocks.

set-custom-pdf-page-size.title: Set Custom PDF Page Size Using PdfPageEditor
set-custom-pdf-page-size.description: Shows how to change the width and height of all pages in an existing PDF to non‑standard dimensions using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

rotate-pdf-pages-using-pdfpageeditor.title: Rotate PDF Pages Using PdfPageEditor
rotate-pdf-pages-using-pdfpageeditor.description: Shows how to rotate all pages of a PDF by setting the Rotation property of PdfPageEditor, applying the changes, and saving the rotated document.

apply-page-transitions-pdf.title: Apply Page Transition Effects with PdfPageEditor
apply-page-transitions-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to set different page transition effects (Fade, BoxOut, Cover) on individual PDF pages using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

set-pdf-page-zoom-double-precision.title: Set PDF Page Zoom Using Double Precision
set-pdf-page-zoom-double-precision.description: Demonstrates how to apply a precise zoom factor to all pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor, casting a double to the required float value.

set-slide-display-duration-pdf-pages.title: Set Slide Display Duration for PDF Pages
set-slide-display-duration-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to assign a uniform display duration (in seconds) to each page of a PDF presentation using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

set-page-content-alignment.title: Set Page Content Alignment Using PdfPageEditor
set-page-content-alignment.description: Shows how to change the horizontal alignment (left, center, or right) of existing PDF page content using the Aspose.Pdf Facades PdfPageEditor class.

resize-pdf-contents-uniform-margins.title: Resize PDF Contents with Uniform Margins
resize-pdf-contents-uniform-margins.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to shrink the content of every page in a PDF by applying equal percentage margins on all sides, producing a consistently laid‑out document.

resize-pdf-contents-asymmetric-margins.title: Resize PDF Contents with Asymmetric Margins
resize-pdf-contents-asymmetric-margins.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor to resize page contents with different left and right margins, applying percentage‑based asymmetric margins on all pages.

resize-pdf-contents-top-bottom-margins.title: Resize PDF Page Contents with Custom Top and Bottom Margins
resize-pdf-contents-top-bottom-margins.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor to resize page contents by specifying different top and bottom margins while keeping left/right margins proportional.

rotate-pdf-pages-reset-orientation.title: Rotate PDF Pages and Reset Orientation
rotate-pdf-pages-reset-orientation.description: Demonstrates how to rotate all pages of a PDF by 90 degrees using PdfPageEditor, then restore the original rotation and save both versions.

change-pdf-page-size-and-revert.title: Change PDF Page Size and Revert Using PdfPageEditor
change-pdf-page-size-and-revert.description: Demonstrates how to modify a PDF page's dimensions with PdfPageEditor, save the changes, and then revert to the original size to test undo functionality.

log-pdf-page-property-changes.title: Log PDF Page Property Changes Using PdfPageEditor
log-pdf-page-property-changes.description: Shows how to modify page properties such as zoom, rotation, and size with Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor and write the original and new values to a log file for audit and debugging.

report-pdf-page-properties-before-after.title: Report PDF Page Properties Before and After Edits
report-pdf-page-properties-before-after.description: Demonstrates how to capture original page size, rotation, and zoom values, apply changes with PdfPageEditor, save the PDF, and then read back the edited properties to generate a before‑and‑after report.

rotate-pages-encrypted-pdf.title: Rotate Pages of Encrypted PDF with PdfPageEditor
rotate-pages-encrypted-pdf.description: Demonstrates opening an encrypted PDF by supplying a password, using PdfPageEditor to rotate all pages, and saving the modified document.

modify-pdf-page-rotation-preserve-signat.title: Modify PDF Page Rotation While Preserving Digital Signature
modify-pdf-page-rotation-preserve-signat.description: Demonstrates how to rotate a specific page in a digitally signed PDF using PdfPageEditor and save the document with an incremental update to keep existing signatures valid.

resize-pdf-pages-preserve-annotations.title: Resize PDF Pages While Preserving Annotations
resize-pdf-pages-preserve-annotations.description: Demonstrates changing the page size of a PDF using PdfFileEditor.ResizeContents, ensuring that annotations and other interactive elements remain functional.

rotate-pdf-pages-preserve-form-fields.title: Rotate PDF Pages While Preserving Form Fields
rotate-pdf-pages-preserve-form-fields.description: Shows how to rotate all pages of a PDF using PdfPageEditor and keep existing form field values intact by exporting them to FDF before rotation and importing them back afterward.

apply-transition-to-odd-pages.title: Apply Transition to Odd Pages in PDF
apply-transition-to-odd-pages.description: Shows how to add a page transition effect only to odd‑numbered pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

set-display-duration-even-pages.title: Set Display Duration for Even Pages in PDF
set-display-duration-even-pages.description: Shows how to assign a custom display duration to even‑numbered pages of a PDF using the PdfPageEditor facade.

zoom-pages-with-images.title: Zoom Only Pages Containing Images in a PDF
zoom-pages-with-images.description: Shows how to detect pages that contain image objects and apply a zoom factor exclusively to those pages using Aspose.Pdf.

resize-contents-only-on-text-pages.title: Resize PDF Contents Only on Pages Containing Text
resize-contents-only-on-text-pages.description: The example scans a PDF to identify pages that contain any text and then resizes the page contents (adding margins) only on those pages using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-rotation-zoom-transition-to-pdf-pa.title: Apply Rotation, Zoom, and Transition to PDF Pages
apply-rotation-zoom-transition-to-pdf-pa.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor to rotate, zoom, and add a transition effect to all pages of a PDF for presentation mode.

set-custom-a4-landscape-page-size.title: Set Custom A4 Landscape Page Size Using PdfPageEditor
set-custom-a4-landscape-page-size.description: Shows how to change all pages of a PDF to A4 landscape dimensions by configuring a PageSize object's Width and Height and applying it with the PdfPageEditor facade.

set-pdf-page-size-letter-portrait.title: Set PDF Page Size to Letter Portrait
set-pdf-page-size-letter-portrait.description: Demonstrates how to change all pages of a PDF to the standard Letter portrait dimensions using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

rotate-landscape-pages-pdf.title: Rotate Landscape Pages in PDF using PdfPageEditor
rotate-landscape-pages-pdf.description: Shows how to detect landscape-oriented pages in a PDF and rotate them 90 degrees with the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor facade.

set-page-transition-duration-by-title.title: Set Page Transition Duration Based on Title Length
set-page-transition-duration-by-title.description: Loads a PDF, reads each page's title (if available), calculates a transition duration from the title length, and applies a blind horizontal transition to each page using PdfPageEditor.

adjust-page-zoom-by-word-count.title: Adjust Page Zoom Based on Word Count
adjust-page-zoom-by-word-count.description: Demonstrates how to extract text from each PDF page, count its words, and set a per‑page zoom level (higher for fewer words, lower for dense pages) using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-change-pdf-page-size.title: Batch Change PDF Page Size Based on File Name
batch-change-pdf-page-size.description: Processes all PDFs in a folder, applying a specific page size to each document based on filename or pattern mappings, and saves the results to an output folder.

extract-rotate-selected-pdf-pages.title: Extract and Rotate Selected PDF Pages
extract-rotate-selected-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to extract specific pages from a PDF, rotate those pages, and save the result as a new PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

merge-pdfs-with-uniform-margins.title: Merge PDFs with Uniform Margins
merge-pdfs-with-uniform-margins.description: Shows how to apply the same margins to two PDF files using PdfFileEditor and then concatenate them into a single merged document.

resize-pdf-pages-and-split-into-chapters.title: Resize PDF Pages and Split into Chapter Files
resize-pdf-pages-and-split-into-chapters.description: Shows how to uniformly shrink the contents of each page in a PDF and then split the resized document into separate one‑page PDFs, creating individual chapter files.

create-pdf-slideshow-with-page-transitio.title: Create PDF Slideshow with Page Transitions
create-pdf-slideshow-with-page-transitio.description: Demonstrates how to use PdfPageEditor to add transition effects and display durations to each page, turning a PDF into a slideshow.

set-boxout-transition-and-zoom.title: Set BoxOut Transition and Zoom on PDF Page
set-boxout-transition-and-zoom.description: Shows how to apply a BoxOut page transition and a 1.3 zoom factor to a specific page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

center-align-page-set-display-duration.title: Center Align Page Content and Set Display Duration
center-align-page-set-display-duration.description: Loads a PDF, uses PdfPageEditor to center the content of page 5 and set its display duration to 4 seconds, then saves the modified document.

add-5-percent-margins-to-pdf-pages.title: Add 5% Margins to PDF Pages and Print
add-5-percent-margins-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to add a uniform 5% margin to every page of a PDF using PdfFileEditor and then print the modified document with PdfViewer.

add-15-percent-margins-booklet.title: Add 15% Margins for Booklet Layout
add-15-percent-margins-booklet.description: Demonstrates how to apply a 15 % margin to selected or all pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades for booklet preparation.

rotate-pdf-pages-landscape-brochure.title: Rotate PDF Pages to Landscape for Brochure Printing
rotate-pdf-pages-landscape-brochure.description: Shows how to rotate all pages of a PDF to landscape orientation and set the page size to A4 using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor, preparing the document for brochure printing.

change-pdf-page-size-to-a3.title: Change PDF Page Size to A3 using PdfPageEditor
change-pdf-page-size-to-a3.description: Shows how to resize all pages of a PDF to A3 dimensions with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

set-pdf-zoom-preview-final-output.title: Set PDF Zoom for Preview and Final Output
set-pdf-zoom-preview-final-output.description: Demonstrates how to adjust the zoom level of a PDF for preview (50% scale) using PdfViewer and for final output (100% scale) using PdfPageEditor.

apply-page-settings-from-json.title: Apply Page Settings from JSON to PDF
apply-page-settings-from-json.description: Demonstrates how to read a JSON configuration and use Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor to rotate, zoom, and align specific pages of a PDF, then save the result.

hybrid-content-resize-mixed-margins.title: Hybrid Content Resize with Mixed Percentage and Absolute Margins
hybrid-content-resize-mixed-margins.description: Shows how to configure ContentsResizeParameters with both percentage‑based and absolute margins and apply them using PdfFileEditor.ResizeContents to resize PDF page contents.

apply-page-transitions-by-index.title: Apply Page Transition Effects Based on Page Index
apply-page-transitions-by-index.description: Demonstrates how to loop through a PDF document and assign different transition types to each page using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor, cycling the effects every three pages.

apply-rotation-page-size-zoom-to-pdf.title: Apply Rotation, Page Size, and Zoom to PDF
apply-rotation-page-size-zoom-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to rotate pages, change the page size, adjust zoom, and save the edited PDF file.
